content: Embraer E175 (embraer.com official spec PDF + globalair.com + flightschoolusa.com): cruise Mach 0.78-0.82 (~450-490kt depending on alt/weight); climb to FL350 ~18min (implies avg climb ~1900fpm over that profile, consistent with commonly cited 2000-2500fpm initial climb); service ceiling 41000ft; landing field length ~4130ft (implies Vref in the 125-135kt range typical for this weight class, not directly stated).
